questions.prompt: She is so funny! She always makes me...
I wish I... at him yesterday.
The students will benefit... grants to study abroad.
He... an old friend at the shopping centre.
Do you know that Martha was offered the position of chief officer?
answers: Do you know that they / the firm offered Martha the position of chief officer?

questions.prompt: They must sweep the floor every day after work.
answers: The floor must be swept every day after work

questions.prompt: Peter’s daughter won a song contest.
questions.instruction: Give a question for the underlined words.
answers: Whose daughter won a song contest?

questions.prompt: That is the flowerpot. I put the key under that pot.
answers: That is the flowerpot under which I put the key
That is the flowerpot (which) I put the key under
That is the flowerpot I put the key under

questions.prompt: The mechanic is fixing my car right now.
answers: I am having / getting my car fixed right now (by a mechanic)
I am having / getting my car fixed right now

manualCorrection.structure: the + comparative adjective / adverb + subject + verb

questions.prompt: It’s impossible that you saw John yesterday because he was in London.
answers: You can’t have seen John yesterday because he was in London

questions.prompt: Paul and Laura went back to home after finish the report.
questions.instruction: Find the mistakes and rewrite correctly.
answers: Paul and Laura went back home after finishing the report

questions.prompt: ‘Did Ms. Warren take her watch to the jeweller’s yesterday?’ the porter said.
answers: The porter asked if / whether Ms. Warren had taken her watch to the jeweller’s the day before / the previous day

questions.prompt: Use the words in the boxes to make a meaningful sentence. Use all and only the words in the boxes without changing their form.
questions.instruction: Words: a / the / them / let / team / fight / without / opposing / win
answers: The opposing team let them win without a fight
